heading: Settlement of accounts of line officers
label: 9842 Settlement of accounts of line officers
text: The Comptroller General shall settle the account of a line officer of the Air Force or the Space Force for pay due the officer even if the officer cannot account for property entrusted to the officer or cannot make a monthly report or return, when the Comptroller General is satisfied that the inability to account for property or make a report or return was the result of the officer having been a prisoner, or of an accident or casualty of war.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)984231:44 (1st sentence).(1st par. 1st sentence), .June 10, 1921, ch. 18, § 30442 Stat. 2431:95.R.S. § 278.The section is made applicable to the Air Force by section 207(a) and (f) of the Act of (ch. 343, ). For comparable provisions that apply to the Army, see the revision note for 10:4842.July 26, 194761 Stat. 502
Amendments2021— inserted “or the Space Force” after “Air Force”.Pub. L. 116–283
